nasb.text: “These are the names of the men who shall apportion the land to you for inheritance: Eleazar the priest and Joshua the son of Nun.

esv.text: “These are the names of the men who shall divide the land to you for inheritance: Eleazar the priest and Joshua the son of Nun.

cnv.text: “這是要把地業分配給你們的人的名字：以利亞撒祭司和嫩的兒子約書亞。

ccb.text: “负责给你们分地的是以利亚撒祭司和嫩的儿子约书亚。
